programme.title: Wilding
programme.desc: Isabella Tree and her husband, Charlie Burrell, strive to breathe new life into the ailing Knepp estate. They reintroduce native ponies, deer, pigs and other wildlife, allowing nature to thrive.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Amanpour and Company
programme.desc: Christiane Amanpour leads discussions about world issues and interviews with global leaders.

programme.title: Finding Your Roots With Henry Louis Gates, Jr.
programme.desc: Actors Ted Danson, Mary Steenburgen and William H. Macy trace their nonconformist ancestors back to the Puritan establishment.

programme.title: The American Revolution
programme.desc: Opposition in colonial North America to British policies over taxes, land and sovereignty escalates into violent confrontation; war gives 13 colonies a common cause.

programme.title: The American Revolution
programme.desc: Congress puts George Washington in command of a new Continental Army; Congress declares American independence in July 1776.

programme.title: Rick Steves' Europe
programme.desc: The Grand Bazaar and spice market in Istanbul; the fall of the ancient capital of Byzantium; Hagia Sophia; Blue Mosque; Topkapi Palace.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.sub-title: Prunella the Packrat; What's in a Name?
programme.desc: Arthur tries to help Prunella with her pack rat habits; Binky finds out his real name.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.sub-title: The Triangle Cafe; Captain O's Birthday
programme.desc: Ozzi and Orli go on a mission to catch the villain who is ruining the Triangle Sisters' café; Opie must collect enough money to pay for Captain O's 10-layer birthday cake.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Wild Kratts
programme.desc: On their annual laundry day, the Kratt brothers disagree on whether blue oceans or green forests are better; Aviva demonstrates how oceans and forests work together.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Weather Hunters
programme.desc: Dot and Al announce the Hunters are spending Christmas in Nigeria, and Corky wonders if she can have a fun Christmas without snow.

programme.title: Lyla in the Loop
programme.sub-title: Lyla Can't Sleep; Hairdos and Hair Don'ts
programme.desc: Lyla struggles to sleep and tries to figure out what is wrong with her sleep routine; Lyla tries to do her own hairstyle.

programme.title: Carl the Collector
programme.sub-title: The Fake Mustache Collection; The Lint Dinosaur Collection
programme.desc: Nico is tired of being mistaken for her twin sister; Carl is upset when Nico breaks the Lint Dinosaur Monday rules and makes a Lint Monster instead.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: A Trip to the Enchanted Garden; A Trip to the Crayon Factory
programme.desc: Mom Tiger shows Daniel the strawberry patch; crayons are made at the factory.

programme.title: Phoebe & Jay
programme.sub-title: Paint on the Mail; The Last Box
programme.desc: Phoebe and Jay accidentally get paint on the mail and have to decode addresses; Phoebe and Jay find their parents' box of memories.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Cinderella needs to tell time for the ball, but her clock is broken, so Nina, Abby and Rudy wonder what tool they can use to fix it.

Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Work It Out Wombats!
programme.sub-title: A Room of Our Own; Zeke's Fairy Village
programme.desc: Malik and Zadie can't agree on how tidy to keep their bedroom; Zeke's friends build houses for the fairies who have moved in.

programme.title: Let's Learn
programme.sub-title: Can You Hear the Long "i" in Find?
programme.desc: Exploring 3-D shapes; making a paper collage; reading "ABC NYC"; blending and decoding long and short i.

programme.title: Elinor Wonders Why
programme.desc: Elinor finds a peculiar-looking owl while visiting her grandparents in the desert; Olive and her friends investigate why a tree has fallen over in the forest.

programme.title: Cyberchase
programme.desc: Buzz, Delete and Digit take a wild ride on the wreaker; Inez and her sister have different ideas about how to fix up their building's courtyard -- Inez wants to plant trees but Camila wants a skatepark.

programme.title: Molly of Denali
programme.desc: Alaska state basketball champion Kamaka Hepa offers Molly and her basketball team pointers on the court.

programme.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Museum
programme.sub-title: I Am David Suzuki; I Am Esther Martinez
programme.desc: David Suzuki explains to Xavier that by taking care of the earth, we take care of ourselves; Esther Martinez explains to Xavier and Yadina about how stories can connect people to their family histories.

programme.title: Baking With Julia
programme.sub-title: Pita Bread and Lamb With Jeffrey Alford and Naomi Duguid
programme.desc: Bread recipes with Naomi Duguid and Jeffrey Alford, including pita bread and Middle Eastern lamb and tomato bread.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Jenn visits Washington's Cherry Blossom Festival and plants a tree; Mark learns how Mount Rushmore was built and shows stone cutting; Nathan visits Abe Lincoln's house then replaces mortise hardware.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.desc: Christiane Amanpour leads discussions about world issues and interviews with global leaders.

programme.desc: Celebrities, cast members and Joanne Rogers recall their favorite moments from "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" as they celebrate the 50th anniversary of the series.

programme.title: Tom Lehrer -- Live in Copenhagen 1967
programme.desc: A rare concert recording from 1967 features 18 of Tom Lehrer's best-known songs, including "The Elements" and "The Vatican Rag.".

programme.desc: Christiane Amanpour leads discussions about world issues and interviews with global leaders.

programme.title: Nature

programme.desc: Scientists try to figure out how to predict weather events called "rain bombs" that sink ships and down planes.

programme.title: Weather Hunters
programme.desc: The Hunters learn how temperatures can affect outdoor plants and gardens.

programme.desc: Making instruments to explore pitch; learning a dance from Uganda; reading "Shadow"; changing sounds -- long I and long o.

programme.sub-title: The Little Drummer; Rest Is Best
programme.desc: Ari tries to be quiet so his sister can take a nap, but a woodpecker keeps making noise outside; the kids learn that all animals need some sort of rest to regain energy and stay healthy.

programme.title: Shakespeare: Rise of a Genius
programme.desc: Shakespeare's life and legacy are threatened when the Gunpowder Plot unearths a secret he has worked all his life to bury; when his daughter is implicated in the fallout, Shakespeare produces "Macbeth.".
